title: centaurea alba subsp. montsicciana
intro: Centaurea alba subsp. montsicciana, also known as White Knapweed, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea alba subsp. montsicciana include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
